ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone where the property is located */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., SF, Apartment, Condo) */,
  "hhID" INTEGER /* ID of the household assigned to the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "quality" INTEGER /* Quality rating of the property (1-5) */,
  "monthlyCost" TEXT /* Monthly cost of the property */,
  "yearBuilt" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "coordX" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the property's location */,
  "coordY" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the property's location */,
  "property_size" INTEGER /* Size of the property in square feet */,
  "num_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "parking_available" INTEGER /* Whether parking is available for the property */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities provided by the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_hhID FOREIGN KEY ("hhID") REFERENCES households ("hhID")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the zone */,
  "zone_coordinates" TEXT /* Spatial coordinates for the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "hhID" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "hh_name" TEXT /* Name of the household */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the household */,
  "num_members" INTEGER /* Number of members in the household */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship between household members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hhID")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality rating */,
  "quality_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality rating */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quality rating */,
  "quality_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property quality rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance request */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance requested */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance request (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance request was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_requests_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maintenance request being assigned */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member assigned to the request */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_assignments_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES maintenance_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_assignments_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff, household) */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions for each user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property value */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the value */,
  "value_date" TEXT /* Date the value was recorded */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the property on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_values_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_taxes" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the tax */,
  "tax_year" INTEGER /* Year the tax was assessed */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Amount of tax owed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_taxes_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household member */,
  "hhID" INTEGER /* ID of the household the member belongs to */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the household member */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the member to the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_members_hhID FOREIGN KEY ("hhID") REFERENCES households ("hhID")
)
